name: 11p15_5_beta_globin_cluster
description: 11p15.5 beta-globin cluster: HBE1 - HBG2 - HBG1 - HBD - HBB locus and the upstream Locus Control Region. Five tandemly arrayed paralogs at >95% identity that arose by gene duplication; recurrent NAHR/gene-conversion drives delta-beta thalassemia, HPFH, hereditary persistence, and the Lepore/anti-Lepore fusion hemoglobins.

architecture.internal_structure: Five paralogous globin genes in 60 kb (HBE-Ggamma-Agamma-HBD-HBB) at 90-99% identity (HBG1/HBG2 ~99%, HBD/HBB ~93%); LCR with five DNase hypersensitive sites upstream; gene-conversion hotspots between HBG1/HBG2 and HBD/HBB.
